# Danesh Mishra - Senior Cloud Architect

> Helping businesses ship scalable cloud solutions faster with AI-augmented development.

This is the WebMCP-enabled portfolio site for Danesh Mishra. AI agents can manage content on this site by editing data files and committing to the repository.

## Links
- Full details: https://danesm.github.io/llms-full.txt
- Home: https://danesm.github.io/
- Projects: https://danesm.github.io/projects
- Skills: https://danesm.github.io/skills
- Blog: https://danesm.github.io/blog
- Contact: https://danesm.github.io/contact
- Repository: https://github.com/danesm/danesm.github.io

## Agent Instructions

To update this site, an AI agent should:

1. Clone the repository: `git clone https://github.com/danesm/danesm.github.io.git`
2. Read `src/data/content-schema.json` for field definitions
3. Make changes to the appropriate file (see Content Paths below)
4. Validate changes against the schema
5. Commit and push to `main` — GitHub Actions will rebuild and deploy

### Content Paths
- **New blog post**: Create `src/content/blog/{slug}.md` with frontmatter (title, date, description, tags)
- **New project**: Append to the array in `src/data/projects.ts`
- **New testimonial**: Append to the array in `src/data/testimonials.ts`
- **New career entry**: Append to the array in `src/data/career.ts`
- **Update profile**: Edit `src/data/professional.ts`
- **Update skills**: Edit `src/data/skills.ts`

### Content Schema
See `src/data/content-schema.json` for JSON Schema definitions of all content types.
